description: State document, in Arabic script. Five faded lines on a small paper fragment. Mentions the state official Fakhr al-Mulk. A Fatimid state official by the title of Fakhr al-Mulk was active in al-Āmir's time around 517 H. See PGPID 34616, PGPID 29220, PGPID 8010, PGPID 10368 for documents mentioning a state official by this title. YU.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
